docs.title: Ethical Pentesting in Virtualized Environments with EVE-NG
docs.text:
Bachelor's Thesis - Eloi Egea Rada

Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science for Management and Information Systems

docs.title: Project Overview
docs.text: Design and implementation of a virtual lab for network security training using EVE-NG, covering reconnaissance, web vulnerabilities, privilege escalation, and cryptography labs aligned with Introduction to Cybersecurity course.

docs.title: Key Components
docs.text:
• EVE-NG: Network emulation platform
  • Parrot Linux: Penetration testing distribution
  • DVWA/Metasploitable: Vulnerable targets
  • Automation: Python/Bash deployment scripts
  • Integration: Existing Tecnocampus VM infrastructure
